name: BEN_PTNL_LER_FOR_PER_
description: BEN_PTNL_LER_FOR_PER for a person is an occurrence of data change detection in person indicative data for a person, an event that is detected as a result of the examination of the passage of time, or a scheduled event that is explicitly assigned to the person.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
